creator: franco@opnsense.org
text:
Created attachment 189056
update to 0.2

Hi,

igmpproxy version 0.2 was released yesterday.  Here are the release notes:

https://github.com/pali/igmpproxy/releases/tag/0.2

Attached is a port update, required fixes for FreeBSD and the request to take maintainership as there is no activity from maintainer in recent years.


Cheers,
Franco
